quality_note: Release levels are project-management gates, not scholarly certification by themselves.

levels.title: Foundation Release
levels.definition: Public site, source corpus, generated readers, project tracker, and deployment workflow exist.

levels.title: Source Coverage Release
levels.definition: Every seeded source has public source-text and chapter-workbench coverage.

levels.title: Scan Verification Release
levels.definition: Priority source claims, equations, and diagrams are checked against scans.

levels.title: Equation Canon Release
levels.definition: Canonical equations have scan verification, notation ledger entries, derivations, and worked examples.

levels.title: Diagram Canon Release
levels.definition: Major diagrams have original crops, provenance, captions, redraws, and linked explanations.

levels.title: Patent Authority Release
levels.definition: Steinmetz patents are authority-checked, downloaded, drawn, summarized, and linked to theory.

levels.title: Definitive Steinmetz Release
levels.definition: All priority books, papers, diagrams, equations, glossary terms, patents, and comparisons pass canonical review.
